results.rendered_html:
ut-tambh (ud-√stambh,  Pāṇ. viii, 4, 61 ; the radical s appears in augmented and reduplicated forms and if [in Veda] the preposition is separated from the verb) P. - (s)tabhnāti (Impv. 2. sg. -(s)tabhāna, impf. ud-astabhnāt, aor. -astāmpsīt,  TBr. iii, 2, 10, 1 , and -astambhīt,  RV. iii, 5, 10 )
to uphold, stay, prop;
to support,  RV. ;  VS. ;  TBr. ;  TāṇḍyaBr.  &c.:
Caus. -tambhayati, to lift up, raise, erect,  Hariv. ;  BhP.  &c.;
to bring up;
to irritate, excite,  Kir. ii, 48 ;  BhP. ;  Uttarar. ;
to raise in rank;
to honour, make respectable.
